message:
feat(fleet): wire fleet quarantine handlers to real validation and FleetControlManager

handle_release():
- Rename _request to request and actively validate/use the payload
- Trim incident_id and reject empty values with FLEET_SCOPE_INVALID
- Derive operation_id and receipt_id from incident_id via utf8_prefix
  instead of trace ID for incident traceability
- Compute real payload_hash via receipt_payload_hash() over
  "release:{incident_id}:{trace_id}" instead of hardcoded zeros

handle_status():
- Replace hardcoded zeroed FleetStatus stub with actual
  FleetControlManager::new().status(zone_id) delegation
- Wire trace context through error mapping path

Tests:
- Update handle_release test with Unicode incident ID and assert on
  incident_id prefix in operation/receipt IDs
- Add handle_release_rejects_empty_incident_id test
- Update handle_status to assert !result.data.activated
- Add handle_status_rejects_empty_zone test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
